hypothesis: Relative to the current off-the-shelf eSEN workflow, fine-tuning eSEN on no more than 100 DFT-labeled SSNEB images per system with a loss that upweights stress errors to parity with forces will reduce stress MAE by at least 50 percent and cut VASP restart iterations by at least 30 percent while maintaining energy barrier deviations no more than 0.02 eV for the CsPbI3 β–γ and TiO2-B→anatase transitions.
